pr.title: Record: PhraseCache + OrderAdaptive N-gram + RegimeTracker — val_bpb 0.1003 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines long variable-length phrase cache plus order-adaptive n-gram/regime gating with score-first TTT and GPTQ-aware mixing to curb eval redundancy.
techniques: Long suffix-matching phrase cache probing multiple lengths via rolling hashes
Order-adaptive entropy gating with regime-aware alpha multipliers over orders 2–9
Score-first TTT with GPTQ int5-aware Hedge mixer and Polyak EMA
